landing.title: Vue Json Form Builder
landing.subtitle: Easily create and manage forms based on JSON Schema
landing.featuresSubheading: One platform for creating, managing, and deploying forms
landing.screenshotPlaceholder: Screenshot of the form builder coming soon

integrations.heading: Integrations
integrations.subheading: Render forms anywhere — web, Vue, or mobile apps

web.title: Web Component
web.description: Use the generic Web Component to embed JSON Schema forms in any web application, framework-agnostic.

vue.title: Vue Component
vue.description: Drop the native Vue component into your Vue 3 app for seamless form rendering with full reactivity.

flutter.title: Flutter Widget
flutter.description: Render forms in your Flutter mobile or desktop apps with a dedicated Flutter widget.

formBuilder.title: Visual Form Builder
formBuilder.description: Design complex JSON Schema-driven forms with a drag-and-drop interface and live preview.

userManagement.title: User & Role Management
userManagement.description: Manage system users, assign roles, and control access to forms and data.

openApi.title: OpenAPI REST Interface
openApi.description: Every resource is accessible via a fully documented, standards-compliant REST API for integrating the platform with other systems.

jsonUiSchema.title: JSON & UI Schema
jsonUiSchema.description: Generate standards-compliant JSON Schema artifacts with an additional UI Schema for customizing field appearance, layout, and dependencies.

versioning.title: Schema Versioning
versioning.description: Track changes to your JSON Schemas over time and roll back to any previous version.

sso.title: Single Sign-On
sso.description: Authenticate via OIDC — one login for all services in your infrastructure.

users.title: Users
users.description: Manage system users, their roles, and access permissions.
users.noSearchResults: No results for '{query}'. Try a different search term.

new.title: New Group
new.subtitle: Create a new group in the hierarchy.

fields.title: Title
fields.name: URL slug (name)
fields.nameHint: Used in URLs and paths. Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional — describe the purpose of this group.
fields.parentHint: Leave empty to create a top-level group.

fields.title: Title
fields.name: URL slug (name)
fields.nameHint: Used in URLs and paths. Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional — describe the purpose of this group.

dashboard.title: Start
dashboard.subtitle: Administrative interface for managing forms, users, and permissions.
dashboard.navUsersDesc: Manage system users, roles, and access.
dashboard.navApiDocsDesc: Browse and test the REST API via Swagger UI.

designSystem.label: Design System
designSystem.hint: Switching the design system updates all PrimeVue components and Tailwind primary / surface utilities instantly — no reload needed.

uv.label: UV Corporate
uv.description: Flat enterprise look with UV brand colors and 0px border radius.

aura.label: PrimeVue Aura
aura.description: Default PrimeVue Aura preset with rounded corners and standard palette.
